subcodes.first_line: O Pen of the Most Ancient! Make mention of the nations, that perchance Thy remembrance may draw them unto God, the King, the Mighty, the Bestower [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم القدم و اذکر الامم لعل یجذبهم ذکرک الی الله الملک العزیز الوهاب ثم
